{{基礎情報 公家
| 氏名 = Chinaso-no-Mikoto
| 画像 =
| 画像サイズ =
| 画像説明 =
| 時代 = {{ill|Ancient|ja|上古}}
| 生誕 = Unknown
| 死没 = Unknown
| 改名 =
| 別名 = Chinaso
| 諡号 =
| 神号 =
| 戒名 =
| 墓所 =
| 官位 =
| 主君 =
| 氏族 = Ki clan ({{ill|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造}})
| 父母 =
| 兄弟 = {{ill|Nakanakusa-hime|ja|中名草姫}}
| 子   =
| 特記事項 =
}}
'''Chinaso-no-Mikoto''' (''chinaso no mikoto''; dates of birth and death unknown) was a {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族}} of ancient Japan and one of the '''{{ill|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造}}'''.

== Overview ==
He appears in the "Tenson Hongi" of the ''{{ill|Sendai Kuji Hongi|ja|先代旧事本紀}}'' as '''Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko Chinaso''', elder brother of Tsukuyone-no-Mikoto's wife {{ill|Nakanakusa-hime|ja|中名草姫}}.

The name Chinaso-no-Mikoto does not appear in the commonly circulated "Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko Genealogy."

== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

== See also ==
*{{ill|List of Figures from before the Asuka Period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}
*{{ill|kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:ちなそのみこと}}
[[Category:Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:紀伊国の人物]]
[[Category:和歌山県の歴史]]
[[Category:生没年不詳]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:智名曽命]]
